newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Established thesis intact: Tongfu handles ~80% of AMD's assembly/test, the long-term AMD cooperation extends into 2026, and it is building hybrid-bonding HBM IP (30+ patent applications). No new contract, capacity, or guidance disclosure in the window.

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node bottleneck lens: OSAT/advanced-packaging tied to AMD compute is a direct chiplet/HBM-package choke point, supporting the June 8 up-call. No fresh company evidence since June 9, so the recent up-move is consolidated rather than extended; hold at the elevated rank. 73% YTD partly captures the catalyst.
verdicts.bull: ~80% of AMD assembly/test; hybrid-bonding HBM IP; chiplet packaging is a 2027 choke point.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but no new orders/capacity since June 9.
verdicts.bear: $16B cap, 73% YTD; AMD concentration and China-policy risk.
